feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Multiple Business Partner IDs in Workforce App for Work agreements
entry.content:
Hello,

we are creating our employees in the S/4HANA Public Cloud System and are having an issue because we are getting multiple business partner created for just one employee.
If we create a work agreement, the system creates a new business partner for this employee instead of just adding a role to the existing employee.
Can you please tell us how it is possible to just creating one business partner?
I have attached a screenshot of one of the employees.

Thanks and best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Test Automation Tool for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We are running into issues with our TDD system, while running TAT. After going over OSS note DIGITS, it says Test plan execution is only supported in the quality tenant. Is there a way it can be activated in the TDD system ?

Thanks
PERSON_NAME



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Accelerated Customer Returns Splitting Criteria
entry.content:
Hello all, I am looking into where (including Bapi exit points) the splitting criteria can be controlled for subsequent documents associated with a CBAR (Accelerated Return). I have a use case where I want to assign a different return reason code for each if two items on a CBAR (this code is being used to drive a FI substitution during posting of the Credit memo). The standard behavior is causing the creation of 2 different GA2 credit memo requests for returns documents.

My question/requirement is: how can I have these 2 lines (with 2 different return reason codes) get created on the SAME GA2 document?

Thank you in advance for the time and suggestions!

Tom Woelfel

entry.title: FBS1 Screen enhancement
entry.content:
Hello community

As per client requirement, in FBS1 t-code after entering input parameters and clicking on GL Fast entry, on output screen one field needs to be added named as "Business Place". Please let me know the following things -

i) Whether adding up Business Place field in FBS1 GL Account Items screen is feasible or not?
ii) If feasible, please let us know how to do the screen enhancement, is there any BADI/Screen Exit available for the same.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Test your processes - Error in Application roles UI
entry.content:
For the custom test plan, suddenly it shows application roles are missing but the relevant roles have been assigned to the test user. This happens after a upgrade/hotfix cycle.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage KPIs and Reports require transport in S4 Hana Private Cloud/Extended Edition
entry.content:
One of the intended strengths of the Manage KPIs and Reports app is giving key users the ability to create KPIs/reports without requiring IT functional/technical resources.

In S4HC Private Cloud (closely aligned with On-Prem) this app requires changes to be done in the Development client (where workbench changes are allowed). This setup ends up negating the ability for Key users to work with the app.

I am looking to see what suggestions or approaches others have regarding addressing this gap in usability of this app for key users.

Thank you in advance for the feedback,

Tom Woelfel

entry.title: ABAP CODE CLEANER
entry.content:
Can we compare ABAP code cleaner Tool with ADT. If Yes what are the Metrics & Measurement of this Tool.

Can we measure below things using ABAP code cleaner:-

Code complexity , Code duplication, Execution time, Memory usage, Modularity, Testability, Code coverage

entry.title: Key User Extensibility is turned off in public cloud system
entry.content:
Unable to activate key user extensibility in the system, as it is greyed out.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SSCUI 100274 is not available for our system
entry.content:
We are looking for the business partner duplicate check functionality SSCUI 100274 in the latest version. Our system is migrated to this latest version but not able to see this configuration ID. Can you help with that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Redundant external calls during order creation via API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hello, we are seeing repetitive calls during order creation via API_SALES_ORDER_SRV to RFC_CALCULATE_TAXES_DOC and /DMA/VALIDATE_ADDRESS. When replicating the same order creating via manually entry within SAP UI this behavior is not the same (only 1 call made to each in this case).

Reaching out to this community to see if anyone has encountered similar behavior and if there was any remediation that was found.

Thank you in advanced for the time and ideas.

Tom Woelfel

entry.title: Transport AVC config from DEV to PRD
entry.content:
Hi community,

I need some help in understanding the mechanism for transporting or moving the products and their AVC configuration from DEV system into PRD system. We are currently creating the products and their configuration in DEV, once finished, do we need to repeat the effort manually in production?

I've found some documentation explaining that for LO-VC the procedure is to replicate the products and the knowledge base using ALE. Is this same method still used in the latest version of S4 while using AVC?

Any references to documentation, manuals, official documentation is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Pablo.

entry.title: How do I register an employee's supervisor?
entry.content:
We are currently registering employee data for flexible workflow.
I would like to register the employee's supervisor, but I don't know how.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4CLOUD : Adobe Form - Purchase Order Item Text not DISPLAYED
entry.content:
Experts, 

We are using S4 HANA CLoud environment 2402 - There is already a custom form configured for Purchase order , i am not able to see the PO item text within form output even though its binded with value : $.PurchaseOrderHeaderTextElement.

How should i debug and analyse ? 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Cloud: Testing Form Development
entry.content:
Team,

I am trying to download the .XML file that includes the sample data from Purchase Order using syntax -'#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#'. but getting below error and upon continuing this error and bypassing using continue nothing happenned.

 

Followed the below thread - 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-s-4-hana-cloud-testing-form-developments-in-adobe-livecycle-designer/ba-p/13416953

entry.title: Is PO Item Text output within form can be controlled at Purchase organization level ?
entry.content: In S4 HANA Public cloud , Is there is a functionality where we can restrict printing a Purchase order item text in the form layout with respect to Purchase Organization ?

entry.title: Get Delivery Header Text in S4HANA Cloud custom CDS view
entry.content:
Team,

How do i get the Long Text stored within Delivery's Header textid within Custom CDS View?

entry.title: Screen personas S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Team,

I would like to ask if i want to restrict posting a movement type from an app called 'Warehouse Monitor' based on some specific users.

Is it possible to cater this via Screen persona?

entry.title: SAP SCREEN PERSONAS - SAP EWM WAREHOUSE MONITOR
entry.content: Wanted to disable button within app - Warehouse Monitor based on movement type that too applicable for some users. Is it possible in S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: In this custom logic " YY1_LGC_PO_AGENT_DET " It says "BPidentificationNumber" is an unknown column
entry.content:
In this custom logic " YY1_LGC_PO_AGENT_DET " CDS Entity I_BUSINESSUSER is deprecated and we replaced with CDS Entity I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC . But  in this custom logic we applied "WHERE BPIdentificationNumber" operation and it says "BPIdentificationNumber is an unknown column"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content: I just wanted to understand in S4HANA Cloud public edition , if I need to debug the logic written inside BADI within CUSTOM LOGIC app. How could I perform ? Also i don't have ADT luxury.
